primary_diagnosis:
Diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL-NOS, GCB type), ID 12/2021 stage IV A (pulmonary
involvement); IPI high (LDH 500, age, stage, performance status, extranodal sites),
transformed from a
Splenic marginal zone lymphoma, ID 12/2021 stage IVAE
Nodal involvement: Spleen; Extralymphatic involvement: Liver
Risk factors: extranodal involvement
question: Recommended management?
tumor_board_decision:
Recommendation for BiTE (Glofitamab versus Epcoritamab). Re-biopsy (persistent CD20
expression?) to be pursued. Molecular tumor board indication.
